title.description: App sutiy jach'a uta uñt'ayatawa. Jach'a markanakan manq'atak utjkaspawa.

subtitle.description: App sutiy uñt'ayatawa jach'a uta q'ipir ukan.

heroTitle.description: Jach'a uta q'ipir ukan jach'a sutinak.

heroSubtitle.description: Jach'a uta q'ipir ukan jach'a sutinakar uñt'ayata.

featuredTitle.description: Manq'atak q'ipirinakan uñt'ayatawa ukhamaraki manq'atak uñt'ayasiñatak.

cookingTime.description: Manq'atak utjkaspawa q'ipirinakan uñt'ayata. {minutes} minutu qillqt'añani.

ramenDescription.text: Jach'a ch'aki wayna k'iwru chashu, suman utji manq'a, ukhamaraki phisqa wayllutaki.

margheritaDescription.text: San Marzano ch'arki, jach'a mozzarella, ukhamaraki basil ukhamarak Neapolitan pizza clásico.

tacosDescription.text: Q'ipi wayna marinado tacos, ananá, qullu, ukhamaraki q'illu ch'uñu tortilla jach'a.

butterChickenDescription.text: Sum uñtawi wayna, tomate manteka ukhamaraki aroma especia sauce.

padThaiDescription.text: T'ika phisqa wayllutu q'ipiri shrimp, tofu, mani, ukhamaraki tamarindo sauce.

crepesDescription.text: Phisqa, suman crepes Nutella, phisqa frutilla, ukhamaraki whip cream.
